response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Friday Chinatown' (00:00-02:45) performed by IRyS via on-screen text. 2. Identified a transition (02:45-02:49). 3. Identified 'Otoko no Ko ni Naritai' (02:49-05:00) performed by IRyS and Oozora Subaru via on-screen text and music/lyrics credits. 4. Searched for lyrics using original artists (Miki Matsubara and Noriko Sakai) and titles. 5. Compiled the lyrics into the final JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two musical performances by VTubers: IRyS performs 'Friday Chinatown', followed by a transition, and then a duet between IRyS and Oozora Subaru performing 'Otoko no Ko ni Naritai'.

scenes.description: IRyS performs 'Friday Chinatown' while playing the keyboard on stage. On-screen text identifies the song title in Japanese.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
Mayonaka no hitogomi ni
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
Hajikeru neon sign
Kata ni butsukaru jingai winku wo nageru
Shiran kao no anata tomadoi no hitokoma
Odoritsukarete itemo asa made asobu wa
Minato no mieru basho de nanika nomitai no yo
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
Jasumin ni kuchizuke wo
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
Watashi mo ikokujin ne
Omise ni narabu kin no doresu wo yubisasu
Shibui kao no anata wagamama ga iitai
Aiso warai no obasan kitto niauu wa to...,
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
In the middle of the crowd at midnight
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
The popping neon signs
I bump into shoulders, someone throws a wink
You act like a stranger, a moment of confusion
Even if I get tired of dancing, I'll play until the morning
I want to drink something where I can see the harbor
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
Kiss the jasmine
It's So Fly-Day Fly-Day CHINA TOWN
I'm a foreigner too, aren't I?
I point to the gold dress lined up in the store
You have a sour face, I want to be selfish
The lady with the fake smile says it will surely look good on you...,

scenes.description: A short musical transition screen between the two performances.
IRyS and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'Otoko no Ko ni Naritai'. Text identifies lyrics by Yoshiko Miura and music by Frankie T.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
男のコになりたいのよ 私
星のハイウェイ バイク飛ばし海へ
アイツの後を つけて行くのさ
そして夢を 聞きたい

今日一日だけでいい リボンを解いて
男のコにさせといて 朝まで一緒ね
だけどchance いつかchance
二人dance する時には
ふいに女に もどるの...,
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to become a boy
I speed my bike down the highway of stars to the sea
I'll follow you
And I want to hear your dreams
Just for today, untie my ribbon
Let me be a boy, together until morning
But chance, someday chance
When we dance together
Suddenly I return to being a woman...,
